name: unique-code-generator

metadata.name: unique-code-generator
metadata.summary: A simple packet for generate a unique and safety passwords!

documentation:
# Unique generate_password
A simple packet for generate unique and safety passwords

## Instalation

```bash
pip install unique_code_generator

functions.name: unique_code_generator.generator.generate_password
documentation:
Generate a unique alphanumeric code of a specified length.

Args:
    length (int): Length of the generated code. Default is 30; include_special_chars (bool): Include special characters in the generated code. Default is True.

Returns:
    str: Generated unique code.
